creator: mmokhi@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Nikolai Lifanov from comment #4)
> I saw that Matthew mention that you got a commit bit... Congrats!
Thanks :)

> Would you prefer that I commit this or that you commit it yourself?
I'd liked to do it, but I still had not received my account.
If you like you can commit it ;-) and if you leave it, I'll do it after I've received the email of my account :-D
